---
title: enforce-slice-style
description: "Enforce consistent empty-slice construction."
sidebar:
  badge:
    text: note
    class: severity-indicator severity-note
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** <span class="severity-indicator severity-note" aria-hidden="true"></span> `note`

Enforce consistent empty-slice construction. Strider default: any style.

## Bad

```go
values := make([]string, 0) // with literal style configured
```

## Good

```go
values := []string{} // with literal style configured
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only enforce-slice-style`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`.
